articles.title: U-space ConOps and research dissemination conference
articles.desc: Event U-space ConOps and research dissemination conference When From 09:30 on 30 September 2019 to 17:30 on 1 October 2019 EUROCONTROL and partners are pleased to invite you to attend a conference which we are organising to present the U-space concept of operations (ConOps) as well as the results from SESAR Joint Undertaking's portfolio of exploratory research and demonstrations. The event will take place on 30 September - 1 October in Brussels. As you can read from the programme below, the event has been structured as follows: Day one : Partners in the SESAR U-space CORUS ConOps will present
